name: Windvigil Angler Gull
description: A medium-sized bird commonly found around Mondstadt, distinguished by its gray-white and gold feathers.\nGuided by seasonal winds and ocean currents, Windvigil Angler Gulls are often quick to notice distant activity across the sea.\nLike gulls elsewhere, they have a habit of helping themselves to any tempting treats left unattended. Still, rather than resorting to daylight robbery, they appear to prefer making their move only when Tubby isn't looking...
